nasb.text: Then Aaron’s sons the priests shall arrange the pieces, the head and the suet over the wood which is on the fire that is on the altar.

esv.text: And Aaron’s sons the priests shall arrange the pieces, the head, and the fat, on the wood that is on the fire on the altar;

cnv.text: 亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把肉塊和頭，以及脂肪，排列在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面。

ccb.text: 然后将肉块、头颅和脂肪都摆在祭坛燃烧的木柴上。
